name: zclass_camera_get_position
description: zClass_Camera::gwCameraGetPosition validates a camera node and copies the local position offset into output floats.
known_limits: VC5SP3 cl 11.00.7022 x86 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 /FAcs COFF byte comparison for ?gwCameraGetPosition@zClass_Camera@@YIHPAUzClass_NodePartial@@PAM11@Z at 0x44a060 currently fails with 127 unmasked mismatches, 4 relocation bytes masked, and 1 VC NOP trimmed; Binary Ninja body is 134 bytes and the VC object symbol is 80 bytes.

The reviewed drift is source-shape/codegen: the original body inlines the camera null, class-data, and class-id checks before copying posOffset, while the current source calls the shared ValidateCameraNode helper. The native smoke verifies the valid position path and the null-camera error return.
